titleStmt.title: SII 18.145: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 145. (B.K. No. 72 of 1934-35.) KAṆVI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in the Mailāraliṅgappa temple.

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the reign of Pratāpa-chakravarti Jagadēkamalladēva is dated in the 4th year of his reign, Durmati, Chaitra s11u. Pāḍiva, Monday, solar eclipse, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkramaṇa corresponding to A.D. 1141, March 10, Monday, f.d.t. ·11. There was a solar eclipse on this day but no Saṁkramaṇa.

It states that when Mahāpradhāṇa, Karituragapaṭṭasāhaṇi, Sēnādhipati and Daṇḍanāyaka Mahādēvarasa was governing the two Six-hundreds, Gōvindamayya of Kōḷivāḍa, the Suṅkavergaḍe of Muḷgunda Twelve, made a grant of the income derived from the perjuṅka and vaḍḍarāvuḷa taxes leviable on the garden of god Mūlasthānadēva of Kaṇi. The grant was made to the god at the instance of Mahāpradhāna and Daṇḍanāyaka Mēdimayya, the officer in charge of perjuṅka and vaḍḍarāvuḷa and was entrusted to Jñānarāśi-Paṇḍita, the āchārya of the temple of Mōrakēs11varadēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūḷastaṁ
bhāya śaṁbhavē ©
© svasti samastabhuvanāsrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ para
mēsvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāsrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ
śrīmatu pratāpacakravartti jagadēkamalladēvara vijayarājyamutta
rōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire
svasti samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ karituraga
paṭṭasāhaṇi sēnādhipati daṇḍanāyakaṁ mahādēvarasaru Era
ḍaṟunūṟumaṁ duṣṭanigrahaviśiṣṭapratipāḷanadiṁ
sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyu ttire . samastaprasasti sahi
taṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ daṇḍanāyakaṁ perjjuṁka vaḍḍarāvuḷada
dhikāri mēdimayyaṁgaḷa besadi muḷguṁda panneraḍaṟa suṁ
kaverggaḍe kōḷivāḍada gōviṁdamayyanu . svasti śrīmatu
cāḷukyapratāpacakravartti jagadēkamallavarṣada nālke
neya durmmatisaṁvatsarada caitra suddha pāḍiva sōmavā
raṁ sūryyagrahaṇa vyatīpāta Uttarāyaṇasaṁkra
māṇadaṁdu śrī kaṇiya mūlastānadēvara tōṁṭada
perjjuṁkamumaṁ vaḍḍarāvuḷamaṁ śrīmōrakēsvaradēvarā
cāryyarjñānaśaktipaṇḍitadēvara kālaṁ karcci dhārā
pūrvvakaṁ mūḍi kaṇiya mūlastāna
dēvargge biṭṭaru .
Digital edition of SII 18.145 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
